    "R1.5": "The request implies improving the narrative arc, which requires reordering paragraphs to present the methods in a more logical sequence.",

    "RX.1": "Any edits must preserve the explicit description of the evaluation protocol without introducing ambiguity.",

rationale.R1.5: The request implies improving the narrative arc, which requires reordering paragraphs to present the methods in a more logical sequence.
rationale.R1.6: The primary, load-bearing task is to address the severe repetitiveness and wordiness at the sentence and paragraph level.
rationale.RX.1: Any edits must preserve the explicit description of the evaluation protocol without introducing ambiguity.
rationale.RX.2: The revised text must not exaggerate the rigor or findings of the described evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The revision must be confined to improving the existing text without adding new information or methods.
rationale.RX.4: The description of the human-subject evaluation protocol must remain accurate to avoid misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: The final text must clearly and faithfully represent the methodological details present in the original artifact.
